Library

The library is designed in a hybrid structure that blends the past and the future and meets international standards. It offers an ideal working environment with options such as individual and group study rooms, seminar room, e-library, book café. It has more than 350 million reliable collections of Turkish, English and Arabic printed and electronic works.

Library services are provided 24/7 by professional librarians, independent of time and space. Library services and physical areas are suitable for disabled users.
